CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT event_date, toRelativeYearNum(event_date) AS relative_year FROM test_dates;
SELECT toRelativeYearNum(toDate('1999-12-31')) AS year_diff FROM test_dates;
SELECT toRelativeYearNum(toDate('2005-01-01')) AS year_diff FROM test_dates WHERE event_date = toDate('2000-06-15');
WITH (SELECT toDate('2022-10-10')) AS target_date SELECT toRelativeYearNum(target_date) AS years_elapsed;
SELECT t1.event_date, toRelativeYearNum(t1.event_date) AS relative_year, t2.adjustment FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN (SELECT 1 AS adjustment) AS t2 ON toRelativeYearNum(t1.event_date) > 10;
SELECT toRelativeYearNum(now() - INTERVAL 5 YEAR) AS years_ago;
CREATE TABLE dates_table (id UInt32, event_date Date) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO dates_table VALUES (1, toDate('2020-02-29')), (2, toDate('2021-03-01'));
SELECT id, event_date, toRelativeYearNum(event_date) AS years_passed FROM dates_table WHERE years_passed IS NOT NULL;
